h82afa7b8g2357g49d6ga93bg3d36536a78f2: Unless you got another reason to be here, feck-shite.

hacb67ac4gac1cg4cf2g80e0g2def4f6a5ebb: I'm looking for someone named Halsin.

hb3d2c4a9g4525g4799g987bg8309a114ae32: Have you seen a druid named Halsin?
hefe412eeg7a23g4a3dg8727g162eae802953: Go on in and have a drink for me, eh?

h9000a616ge089g474fgb901gb56c63acbe59: Rest of her litter's inside, in the pens. Beautiful beasts.

h4c18f239gc2f2g4a03g9768g31bd9c42e7c7: Be a shame if you came all this way without havin' a look. But I can't let you pass just like that.

h768dda9ag06dbg4dbdg897dgfe466b90a9f4: I'm looking for someone named Halsin.

ha120faf3g469bg4821g83c1gc993e6ded6ef: Lads're celebrating the raid on Waukeen's Rest. Captured a duke, we did! All the way from the city.
h6895d3ceg7748g4b26g9d30g110738703c41: I'm sure the higher-ups'll make sure you get the best of the spoils, your excelness. The boss is in the temple inside. Minthara too. A-and Priestess Gut can show you how many new recruits we got!

h9f9f7f16g42c4g4bd2gb031gdfa393a44be3: Y-yes sir. I promise, sir. Never again.
